message.content:
Certainly! Here is the alignment of the code with the transcript based on the provided text entries:

```json
[{
    "text": "thought the video sucked comment below",
    "code": [
        "class Solution {",
        "    public List<Integer> postorder(Node root) {",
        "        LinkedList<Node> stack = new LinkedList<>();",
        "        LinkedList<Integer> output_arr = new LinkedList<>();",
        "        if (root == null) {",
        "            return output_arr;",
        "        }",
        "        stack.add(root);",
        "        while (!stack.isEmpty()) {",
        "            Node node = stack.pollLast();",
        "            output_arr.addFirst(node.val);",
        "            for (Node child : node.children) {",
        "                stack.add(child);",
        "            }",
        "        }",
        "        return output_arr;",
        "    }",
        "}"
    ]
}]
```
